name: 1-Db Goddess
description_html:
At 1st Phorm, we understand the specific challenges that stand in your way as a woman. That's why we developed 1-Db Goddess, a formula designed to support fat loss for women.

1-Db Goddess can help support:

• Fat Loss
• Craving & Appetite Regulation
• Healthy Metabolism
• Hormone Balance
• Sustained Energy

Fat loss can be an extra challenge for women in particular. With a higher percentage of fat-storing hormones, women generally carry more fat than men. Their fat also has a tendency to settle in the hips, butt, thighs, and lower midsection. Add monthly cycles, water retention, and bloating to that mix ... and you have a recipe for difficult weight loss.

That's why many women turn to women's weight loss supplements like 1-Db Goddess, which can help support fat loss. 1-Db Goddess is designed to address fat loss with targeted thermogenic components. With a combination of powerful ingredients, 1-Db Goddess is formulated for the female body's tolerance levels and dieting needs in mind.

Dieting to lose weight can cause many women to experience mood swings, cravings, decreased energy, and an overall "blah" feeling. 1-Db Goddess is a weight loss supplement that can help support reduced stress from dieting. With balanced stress, metabolism, energy, and focus can all improve.

1-Db Goddess also includes ingredients that can help support hormonal balance. With hormones in check, better mood and energy levels can be soon to follow.

Last but not least, 1-Db Goddess can help support increased calorie burning. This can help close the gap between calories consumed vs calories burned, positioning the body in a better place to lose weight.

For extra fat loss support, use 1-Db Goddess in conjunction with Thyro-Drive, a sensible meal plan, plenty of water, and an exercise regimen.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: 1-Db Overdrive
description_html:
1-Db Overdrive can help support:

• Fat Loss
• Craving & Appetite Regulation
• Healthy Metabolism
• Hormone Balance
• Sustained Energy

1-Db Overdrive is a powerful thermogenic that can help support your body's natural fat-burning processes. The formula includes ingredients like green coffee bean extract and Paradoxine (Grains of Paradise) that can help support increased core body temperature and resting metabolic rate. This can allow the body to burn more calories throughout the day to help eliminate stored fat.

With 150mg of caffeine plus advanced compounds like Dynamine and TeaCrine, 1-Db Overdrive can help support energy and laser focus throughout the day. These ingredients work together to provide that "dialed-in" feeling without the crash.

1-Db Overdrive also includes ingredients designed to help support balanced insulin levels and better carb utilization. Bitter orange extract and green tea extract can help support appetite control as well, making it easier to stick to a good nutrition plan. When you're not fighting constant cravings, staying on track becomes much simpler.

For complete metabolic support, stack 1-Db Overdrive with Thyro-Drive or as part of the 1-Db Overdrive Fastpack. If you want the most out of your training and fat loss goals ... 1-Db Overdrive may be the solution for you!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

1st Phorm has teamed up with The Groove Belt™ to provide you with the highest quality, do everything go anywhere belt that is perfect for the office, the woods, the backyard, and everything in between!

name: 24 Hour Weight Loss Stack For Men
description_html:
Reaching your goals takes effort, but with that effort, you want the best results ... right? The 24-Hour Weight Loss Stack can help maximize the fat loss you see from the effort you’re putting in by giving your body what it needs to help support efficient and effective fat burning.

This stack contains:

  • 1-Db Overdrive
  • Thyro-Drive
  • Core-21

1-Db Overdrive

1-Db Overdrive is a thermogenic that can help support:

  • Fat Loss
  • Craving & Appetite Regulation
  • Healthy Metabolism
  • Hormone Balance
  • Sustained Energy

Thyro-Drive

Thyro-Drive is an advanced formula that can help support:

  • Healthy Thyroid Function
  • Optimal Metabolism
  • Natural Energy Levels

Core-21

The body's stress hormone, cortisol, can be a big hindrance to fat loss. When cortisol levels remain elevated, it signals the body to hold onto fat in the midsection and can affect the ability to recover from workouts. That's why we created Core-21. As a nighttime supplement, Core-21 can help support:

  • Natural Cortisol Reduction
  • Overnight Fat Loss
  • Metabolic Health
  • Nighttime Recovery

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Adrenal Restore
description_html:
Adrenal Restore is a comprehensive supplement designed to help support adrenal gland function and hormone balance.

Adrenal Restore can help support:

  • Natural Stress Response
  • Hormone Balance
  • Natural Energy Levels
  • Adrenal Gland Function
  • Overall Wellness

The adrenal glands play a crucial role in producing hormones that help regulate stress response, energy levels, and overall well-being. They help produce hormones like cortisol, DHEA, and adrenaline that are essential for daily function.

Chronic stress from work, training, and daily life can put extra demand on the adrenal glands. This also includes the use of stimulants like caffeine, which are processed through the adrenal glands. Over time, these stressors can impact how these glands function.

This can lead many people to experience symptoms such as:

  • Feeling tired despite adequate sleep
  • Difficulty getting up in the morning
  • Cravings for sweet or salty foods
  • Heavy reliance on caffeine for energy
  • Feeling overwhelmed or rundown

Instead of masking symptoms with quick fixes like energy drinks, Adrenal Restore was formulated to help support adrenal glands at the source. Adrenal Restore combines ingredients that can help support your body's ability to manage stress and maintain healthy hormone balance. By supporting the adrenal glands, natural energy levels and overall wellness can soon follow.

Don't let chronic stress impact your quality of life. Support your body's natural stress response and adrenal function with Adrenal Restore.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: AlphaSurge DRV
description_html:
AlphaSurge DRV is a non-stimulant pre-workout designed for those skin-tearing pumps in the gym!

The ingredients in AlphaSurge DRV were combined to help support:

• Nitric Oxide Production
• Nutrient-Rich Blood Flow to Muscle Cells
• Reduced Muscle Fatigue
• Muscle Growth & Repair
• Increased Protein Synthesis
• Glycogen Uptake

AlphaSurge DRV isn’t just another typical nitric oxide “pump” pre-workout product. Specifically formulated for athletes, AlphaSurge DRV is engineered with a hand-selected blend of ingredients that can help support nitric oxide production. This can lead to increased muscle cell volume and improved nutrient delivery during training sessions.

With increased levels of nitric oxide, the body draws more blood into the muscle. Through this, more glycogen and nutrients can be accepted by the cell membrane, forcing it to expand. This process can help signal increased protein synthesis, muscle growth, and repair.

The precise selection of ingredients in AlphaSurge DRV can also help support the evacuation of acid buildup. This can help fight off muscle fatigue, improving endurance to get in those last few precious repetitions.

Experience the difference AlphaSurge DRV can make in your training today!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

name: AlphaSurge Pump Shot
description_html:
AlphaSurge Pump Shot is a powerful non-stimulant, liquid "pump" pre-workout. AlphaSurge Pump Shot can help support:

  • Nitric Oxide Production
  • Oxygen & Nutrient Delivery
  • Muscle Cell Volumization (Pump)
  • Training Performance
  • Muscular Endurance 

Unlike traditional pre-workouts, AlphaSurge Pump Shot comes in a convenient liquid format. Just pour, drink, and go. No mixing, no mess, no waiting.

The ingredients in AlphaSurge Pump Shot work together to help support nitric oxide production. Increased nitric oxide can help promote blood flow to working muscles. This can help support nutrient and oxygen delivery during intense training sessions.

The combination of glycerol, agmatine sulfate, and l-norvaline can help support muscle cell volumization. This is what draws water and nutrients into muscle cells, creating that full, pumped feeling. Meanwhile, Alpha-GPC can help support mental focus and the mind-muscle connection during your workout.

AlphaSurge Pump Shot contains zero stimulants. This makes it great for evening workouts and stacking with your favorite stimulant pre-workout. It's also a great option for those sensitive to caffeine.

Each bottle contains roughly 30 servings. Simply take 1 tablespoon (0.5 fl oz) 15-30 minutes before training.

Experience the difference AlphaSurge Pump Shot can make in your training. Try AlphaSurge Pump Shot today!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Anabolic Bridge
description_html:
Anabolic Bridge is an essential amino acid supplement designed to bridge gaps between meals when the body may begin breaking down muscle.

Anabolic Bridge can help support:

  • Muscle Protein Synthesis
  • Lean Muscle Building
  • Muscle Repair & Recovery
  • Consistent Anabolic State 

Your body needs essential amino acids to build muscle. But here's the catch: your body can't make these amino acids on its own. You have to get them from food or supplements. Even when you eat protein or drink a protein shake, your amino acid levels spike for about 2 hours, then start dropping back down. When amino acid levels drop, your body switches from building muscle to breaking it down. This is the opposite of what you want!

Anabolic Bridge was designed to solve this problem. Instead of drinking protein shakes every 2 hours all day long, you can use Anabolic Bridge to keep your amino acid levels elevated between meals. This can help keep the body in a muscle-building state throughout the day.

Anabolic Bridge contains the exact ratio of essential amino acids your muscles need, based on cutting-edge research. These aren't random amino acids ... they're specifically chosen and balanced to match what's found in muscle tissue. This precise formula can help support maximum muscle protein synthesis, which is the process used to build and repair muscle.

Use Anabolic Bridge during those longer gaps between meals when your body might start breaking down muscle instead of building it. Whether you're at work, traveling, or just can't get to your next meal or protein shake ... Anabolic Bridge can help support your muscle-building goals by delivering essential amino acids when you need them most.

With Anabolic Bridge, you don't have to worry about losing your hard-earned muscle. Bridge the gap between meals and keep your body building muscle with Anabolic Bridge!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: B-Complex
description_html:
1st Phorm B-Complex can help support:

  • Natural Energy Levels
  • Mental Clarity
  • Cellular Function
  • Overall Wellness

B vitamins are critical micronutrients when it comes to your overall health. They are associated with everything from energy metabolism to cognitive function, cellular health, and more.

While B vitamins are found in the foods we eat every day ... stress and other environmental factors can increase the daily demand for these vitamins. That's why we created B-Complex.

B-Complex is our B vitamin supplement that contains all 8 of the essential B vitamins in highly bioavailable forms. That's why we use methylated forms of folate and vitamin B12 ... to help support absorption and effective B-vitamin utilization.

Support energy along with cardiovascular, immune, and nervous system function with B-Complex!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: BCAAs
description_html:
Branched Chain Amino Acids, or BCAAs, are three of the essential amino acids your body requires to function. These three amino acids: Leucine, Isoleucine, and Valine, can help support muscle protein synthesis, muscle growth, and muscular endurance.

Our BCAA Powder is formulated with the widely used 2:1:1 ratio of Leucine to Isoleucine to Valine. This ratio is designed to support:

  • Muscular Endurance
  • Muscle Repair & Growth
  • Muscle Protein Synthesis
  • Muscle Preservation

Since the body doesn't produce BCAAs on its own, these essential amino acids can be useful in many ways. Whether you're an athlete, bodybuilder, or even just a casual weightlifter, BCAAs can help support your goals. 

BCAA powder is best known as an intra-workout supplement that can help support muscular endurance. These amino acids can help support muscle tissue during periods of fasting, cardio, or intense training. 1st Phorm BCAAs are designed to help support consistency during intense, high-volume training sessions.

Our BCAAs were formulated for consumption during workouts and at any other time throughout the day. Consider BCAAs to be a low-calorie drink that can help support hydration and amino acid intake.

1st Phorm BCAA powder was also designed with quality, mixability, and flavor in mind. Our formula also comes free of artificial colors, sweeteners, and unnecessary fillers.

Support your training performance with 1st Phorm BCAAs today!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: CLA
description_html:
Our CLA Supplement can help support:

  • Healthy Weight Management
  • Fat Metabolism
  • Healthy Body Composition
  • Lean Mass

Conjugated Linoleic Acid, also known as CLA, is a naturally occurring omega-6 fatty acid found in dairy and meat. The problem is that it's only found in small, trace amounts, making it difficult to get the proper amount. This is why supplementation can become helpful ... especially because the body can not produce CLA on its own.

1st Phorm’s CLA was formulated with a full 3,000 milligrams. The typical daily intake for the average American is reported to be just 181 milligrams. Studies have shown that a daily dose of up to 3,000 milligrams can help support the many positive effects associated with CLA.

Research has shown that CLA can help support healthy weight management and body composition.

CLA has also been shown to help support nutrient utilization and fat metabolism. Beyond that, CLA can help support recovery from training. This is because of the lean mass and immune-supporting properties of CLA.

With consistent use over time, there can be additional benefits of using a CLA supplement. It can help support healthy cholesterol levels and hunger management.

Our CLA supplement is stimulant-free, so you can use it in combination with a stimulant-based product. It can also be taken on its own to help support your body composition goals.

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Collagen Natural with Dermaval
description_html:
Collagen Natural with Dermaval™ is a premium, naturally-sweetened collagen powder designed to help support:

  • Skin Elasticity & Firmness
  • Joint Health
  • Hair & Nail Strength
  • Connective Tissue Wellness

Collagen is the most abundant protein in the human body. It plays a critical role in the structure of joints, tendons, ligaments, bones, skin, hair, and nails. As we age, collagen production declines, which can impact joint health and skin firmness over time.

1st Phorm Collagen Natural with Dermaval™ is formulated using five diverse types of hydrolyzed collagen peptides, providing a broad amino acid profile to help meet the body's collagen needs.

The collagen is processed at lower temperatures and hydrolyzed for improved bioavailability and easy mixing.

What sets Collagen Natural with Dermaval™ apart is the addition of Dermaval™. Dermaval™ is a phytonutrient-rich complex that is designed to help support healthy elastin-related skin properties. While collagen helps provide structure, elastin is responsible for skin elasticity and firmness. Together, collagen and elastin work to support skin appearance and healthy connective tissue.

Collagen Natural with Dermaval™ is an easy and versatile way to support your daily collagen intake. Mix it into coffee, smoothies, protein shakes, or water for convenient daily use.

Support your skin, joints, hair, and nails with 1st Phorm Collagen Natural with Dermaval™.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Colostrum
description_html:
Foundational Gut & Immune Support

1st Phorm Colostrum can help support:

• Gut Health & Restoration
• Digestive Function
• Immune System Strength & Resilience
• Recovery from Physical Activity
• Overall Wellness & Vitality

If you're dealing with digestive issues, frequent illness, or slow recovery, your gut lining and immune system may need targeted support. Modern stress, processed foods, and antibiotic use can compromise your gut barrier, leading to inflammation and weakened immunity.

Colostrum is nature's powerful gut repair and immune support superfood - the nutrient-rich fluid produced by mammals in the first few days after giving birth. Colostrum contains IGF-1 and TGF-β growth factors, which can help repair and regenerate damaged gut lining. It also has lactoferrin, an iron-binding protein that can help starve bad bacteria of the iron they need to thrive.

On top of the gut-supporting elements of Colostrum, it also contains IgG, IgA, and lgM antibodies. These antibodies can help support and provide natural immune defense. 

Our premium Colostrum is sourced exclusively from 100% Grass-Fed Bovine Colostrum collected only from the first 2 milkings. This ensures the highest concentration of bioactive compounds.

1st Phorm Colostrum is also processed using low-heat spray drying to preserve maximum nutritional value. Each serving provides 2,000mg of bovine colostrum with an impressive 40% standardized immunoglobulin concentration. These are the immune-supporting compounds found in colostrum that make it so powerful! With 75.6% protein content and minimal fat (just 3.3%), you're getting a clean, efficient supplement.*

• Gluten-Free
• Non-GMO
• Free from Artificial Sweeteners
• Manufactured in a cGMP and FDA-inspected Facility in the USA

name: Core-21
description_html:
Quality sleep is one of the most important factors in pursuing and achieving your goals, whether that be recovery, fat loss, or both! The problem is that it's commonly overlooked. Just one night of poor sleep has been shown to cause an increase in the appetite-stimulating hormone ghrelin. It can also elevate cortisol levels and decrease glucose tolerance, both of which lead to poor metabolism and poor recovery.

That’s why we developed Core-21, a cortisol support supplement that can help support:

  • Nighttime Recovery
  • Healthy Cortisol Levels
  • Metabolic Health
  • Nighttime Relaxation

In today’s society, stress is everywhere. Whether this stress is mental, physical, or emotional, it increases your cortisol levels. When your cortisol levels remain elevated, it signals your body to hold onto fat in your midsection, and can affect the ability to recover from workouts. It can also lead to chronic lethargy and tiredness. This is where a natural cortisol support supplement can help support balanced stress, fat loss, and proper recovery.

As a nighttime cortisol support supplement, Core-21 can help support restful sleep and healthy stress levels. Deep sleep can help naturally balance cortisol and encourage better recovery. Sleep also plays a critical role in optimal metabolism.

Our cortisol support supplement, Core-21, also includes a blend of key digestive enzymes designed to support overnight digestion and nutrient assimilation.

For maximum results, Core-21 can also be paired with the 1-Db Overdrive (for Men) or 1-Db Goddess (for Women) Weight Loss Systems.

Support natural cortisol reduction and nighttime relaxation with Core-21.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Digestive Enzymes
description_html:
Digestive Enzymes for Digestive Support

1st Phorm Digestive Enzymes can help support:

  • Digestive Health
  • Nutrient Absorption
  • Protein, Carbohydrate, and Fat Utilization
  • Overall Wellness

Proper nutrition plays an important role in overall health. While the foods you eat provide essential nutrients, your body must first break those foods down before they can be absorbed and utilized. That’s where digestive enzymes come into play.

Digestive enzymes are proteins produced by the body that help break down protein, carbohydrates, and fats into smaller components the body can absorb and use. A high-quality digestive enzyme supplement can help support digestion and nutrient absorption, especially during times when the digestive system may be under increased demand.

1st Phorm Digestive Enzymes is a comprehensive digestive enzyme supplement formulated with a 500 mg blend of digestive enzymes designed to help support the breakdown of protein, carbohydrates, and fats. Our formula also includes Bromelain and Papain, naturally occurring enzymes commonly used to help support digestive processes and nutrient absorption.

By supporting digestion and nutrient utilization, a digestive enzyme supplement can be a useful addition to a well-rounded nutrition routine.

Support your digestive health and nutrient absorption with 1st Phorm Digestive Enzymes.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Endura-Formance
description_html:
Endura-Formance is a caffeine-free pre-workout designed to help support muscle endurance and strength without stimulants.

Endura-Formance can help support:

  • Muscle Power & Strength
  • Muscular Endurance
  • Oxygen & Nutrient Delivery
  • Muscle Hydration
  • Training Performance

Not everyone wants or needs caffeine before training. Whether you train late in the evening, are sensitive to stimulants, or simply prefer a caffeine-free option ... Endura-Formance can help support your performance goals without the jitters or crash.

Endura-Formance combines clinically studied ingredients to help support muscle performance from multiple angles.

To start, Endura-Formance includes a full 5g of creatine monohydrate. Creatine can help support ATP regeneration (the body's quick-burst energy source) and muscle power output during intense training sessions.

Endura-Formance also comes equipped with beta-alanine, an amino acid that can increase carnosine levels. Carnosine can help buffer acid in the blood from muscle breakdown to help support improved muscular endurance.

With ingredients such as Betaine Anhydrous, Peak02™, and S7®, Endura-Formance is built for performance. This combination can help support muscle hydration and oxygen delivery to working muscles.

Whether you're training for strength, endurance, or overall athletic performance ... Endura-Formance can help support your goals with a comprehensive caffeine-free pre-workout formula.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Essential Amino Acids
description_html:
Essential Amino Acids supplement (EAAs) is designed to provide the body with the 9 amino acids it can't create on its own ... but are required to build and repair muscle tissue.

Essential Amino Acids (EAAs) can help support:

  • Muscle Repair & Growth
  • Muscular Endurance
  • Proper Hydration
  • Muscle Preservation
  • Muscle Protein Synthesis

Muscle is made of protein, and that protein is in a constant state of turnover. As these proteins break down, the goal is to produce new proteins to take their place. For this process to take place, the body needs a complete protein source. This is a protein that contains all 9 essential amino acids.

When all 9 of these amino acids are present, the body can enter a state of anabolism. This is when muscle protein synthesis can take place, supporting recovery and lean muscle building. 

Our Essential Amino Acids supplement (EAAs) contains 6.5g of essential amino acids in a ratio that mimics the exact amino acid profile of muscle tissue. This gives the body the ability to rebuild muscle and stimulate new muscle growth.

The body is more efficient at repair and recovery when properly hydrated. That's why our Essential Amino Acids supplement (EAAs) also contains a blend of 6 different electrolytes.

You can use Essential Amino Acids throughout the day, between meals that are longer than 3 hours apart. Essential Amino Acids is also great to take pre-workout, intra-workout, and with any meal that doesn't contain an ideal protein source.

Take your results to the next level - Try Essential Amino Acids to help support muscle repair, growth, and recovery today!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Full-Mega
description_html:
Full-Mega is a fish oil & omega-3 softgel supplement with efficacious amounts of EPA and DHA.

Full-Mega can help support:

  • Cardiovascular Health
  • Cognitive Function
  • Inflammation Management

Omega-3s are essential fatty acids that can be very beneficial for our overall health. For one, getting ample amounts of omega-3s can help manage the body's inflammatory response. These essential fats are also known as "brain food" because they've been shown to support healthy brain function.

Of these fatty acids, EPA and DHA can be particularly helpful. These are two omega-3 fatty acids that can be found and sourced from oily fish. In studies, EPA and DHA have been shown to help support heart health and cardiovascular function.

If your diet is not rich in meals containing fresh-caught, oily fish ... that's where Full-Mega can help. Full-Mega contains an impressive 1.5g of combined EPA and DHA, as well as a full 2.5g of total omega-3 fatty acids. It's a softgel fish oil supplement that is sourced exclusively from fresh, cold water wild-caught Icelandic mackerel, herring, anchovies, and sardines. To ensure a high-quality fish oil, the fish are caught using sustainable fishing methods and green technology.

Help support your body’s overall health by supplementing daily with EPA and DHA from Full-Mega omega-3 fish oil softgel supplement.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: G.D.A.
description_html: Founded on Quality, Built on Service, Measured on Results. 1st Phorm offers everything you need to elevate your fitness journey, including premium supplements, athletic apparel, and the 1st Phorm app.

name: GDA
description_html:
1st Phorm Glucose Disposal Agent (GDA) can help support:

  • Carbohydrate Utilization
  • Balanced Blood Sugar
  • Improved Insulin Sensitivity
  • Appetite & Craving Regulation

Proper glucose disposal can be a major key to fat loss, athletic performance, and glucose regulation. This is something a good Glucose Disposal Agent can help support.

1st Phorm Glucose Disposal Agent (GDA) is formulated with full doses of ingredients to help support the body's ability to deal with elevated glucose levels. This can lead to more balanced glucose levels.

Glucose Disposal Agent (GDA) was designed to help support increased insulin sensitivity. It contains ingredients such as Banaba Leaf Extract R-ALA, Vanadyl Sulfate, Barberry Extract, and Cinnamon, which can help harness natural insulin to shuttle more glucose into the muscle. This can leave less sugar circulating in the bloodstream.

Research shows that storing more glucose in the muscle can decrease the amount of glucose stored as fat. An increase in muscle glucose, known as glycogen, can also lead to greater athletic performance. By improving the body's sensitivity to insulin, it not only loads more glycogen in the muscle ... It also increases how effectively muscle can uptake other valuable nutrients for repair and recovery.

Glucose Disposal Agent (GDA) includes Gymnema Sylvestre Leaf Extract as well. This ingredient can help slow the absorption of carbs from the intestines to the bloodstream. This can help support the body's ability to support glucose metabolism, too.

With more stable glucose levels, cravings and appetite can be much more tame. Not only that, but fat loss can also be minimized as a result.

Support improved carbohydrate utilization with 1st Phorm Glucose Disposal Agent (GDA)!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: GI Advantage
description_html:
GI Advantage: Comprehensive GI Support & Digestive Health

GI Advantage is a comprehensive GI support supplement designed to help support:

  • Healthy Digestion
  • Digestive Lining Health
  • Immune Function
  • Bacterial Balance
  • Overall Gut Wellness

Your digestive system plays an important role in overall health. It affects how your body absorbs nutrients and supports immune function. When digestion is supported, your body can better maintain daily wellness.

GI Advantage is formulated specifically for GI support. It features a blend of researched ingredients designed to help support normal gastrointestinal function and digestive comfort.

The formula includes L-Glutamine, one of the most abundant amino acids in the body. L-Glutamine plays a role in supporting digestive lining health and normal gut barrier function. This is important for overall GI support.

GI Advantage also contains Galactoarabinan, a specialized prebiotic fiber. Prebiotics help nourish beneficial bacteria in the gut and support a balanced gut microbiome. This helps support normal digestive and immune function.

Botanical ingredients such as Aloe Vera, Slippery Elm Bark, and Marshmallow Root contain naturally occurring mucilaginous compounds. These ingredients are traditionally used to help support digestive tract comfort.

The formula also includes Licorice Root, which helps support the stomach’s mucosal lining, and Dimethylglycine (DMG) to support normal immune function. Zinc is included to support healthy tissue function and normal mucus secretion.

GI Advantage is designed for daily GI support. It helps maintain digestive comfort and overall gut wellness as part of a balanced diet and healthy routine.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Glutamine
description_html:
Glutamine Support for Training, Recovery, and Overall Wellness

1st Phorm Glutamine powder can help support:

  • Muscle Recovery
  • Immune Function
  • Gastrointestinal Health

Glutamine is the most abundant amino acid in the human body. Amino acids are the building blocks of protein, and glutamine is naturally present in skeletal muscle and other tissues throughout the body.

Glutamine plays a role in many normal physiological processes, including protein metabolism and cellular function. During periods of intense training or physical stress, glutamine levels may fluctuate. For this reason, some people choose to supplement with glutamine powder as part of a balanced nutrition and training routine.

1st Phorm Glutamine provides a convenient way to help support glutamine intake. Supplementing with glutamine can help support normal muscle function and recovery.

Glutamine also plays a role in supporting normal immune function and gastrointestinal health. It is commonly included in wellness and performance-focused supplement routines designed to support overall health during periods of increased physical demand.

Whether your goal is to support training performance, maintain lean muscle, or support overall wellness ... glutamine powder can be a useful addition to a well-rounded supplement routine.

Support your training and recovery routine with 1st Phorm Glutamine.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: ISSA Certification
description_html:
DESCRIPTION:

We've partnered with ISSA as an approved provider to bring you their most popular certifications at a deeply discounted rate ... another great benefit of being a 1st Phorm Legionnaire.

After you complete your purchase, please allow 1-2 business days for your access key to the certification program you purchased to arrive. We will send it in a separate email at that time.

ISSA Certified Personal Trainer (CPT)

The ISSA Certified Personal Trainer (CPT) program offers a comprehensive introduction to the world of personal training. Empowering you with foundational knowledge in exercise science and client relations, this certification prepares you to craft individualized fitness programs that promote lifelong health and wellness. Upon completion, you'll be adept at designing tailored workouts that align with clients' unique fitness goals and inspire them toward peak physical performance.

ISSA Specialist in Strength and Conditioning (SSC)

Dive deep into the mechanics of athletic performance with the ISSA Specialist in Strength and Conditioning (SSC). This program equips trainers with the expertise to elevate athletic prowess, focusing on power generation, agility, and endurance. Certified trainers will emerge with the skills to develop rigorous training regimens that catapult athletes to their optimal competitive edge.

ISSA Nutritionist Certification

The ISSA Nutritionist Certification provides a holistic overview of nutritional science, laying the groundwork for impactful dietary consultations. This program delves into the intricacies of macronutrient balance, dietary planning, and health optimization. Graduates will confidently guide clients in making informed food choices to bolster well-being and complement fitness regimens.

ISSA Specialist in Sports Nutrition (SSN)

Tailored for those aiming to optimize athletic performance through diet, the ISSA Specialist in Sports Nutrition (SSN) illuminates the nexus between nutrition and physical exertion. The course covers hydration strategies, energy yield, and recovery nutrition. As a certified specialist, you'll offer athletes targeted dietary guidance that aligns with their sport and performance goals.

ISSA Group Fitness Instructor

Champion the energy and dynamism of group workouts with the ISSA Group Fitness Instructor certification. This program readies instructors to lead and inspire groups, mastering the nuances of choreography, synchronization, and participant engagement. Certified instructors will create captivating group fitness experiences that motivate participants and foster a communal spirit.

ISSA Transformation Specialist

The ISSA Transformation Specialist course is about creating holistic change. Beyond just physical shifts, this program delves into the psychology of transformation, enabling trainers to support clients' mental and emotional journeys. Certified specialists will possess the tools to guide complete life overhauls, ensuring clients emerge healthier in body, mind, and spirit.

name: Ignition
description_html:
Ignition is a premium glycogen supplement designed to help support post-workout recovery and muscle glycogen replenishment.

Ignition can help support:

• Muscle Glycogen Replenishment
• Post-Workout Recovery
• Muscle Cell Nutrient Uptake
• Training Performance

When it comes to quality muscle gains, post-workout nutrition can play a big role. But the truth is, protein alone after your workout is only part of what the body needs to recover properly. When you resistance train, your body's priority afterward is to replenish the energy stores it lost during the workout. Taking protein by itself means your body may convert much of it into glucose for energy replenishment. That just means less protein will be used for muscle repair and growth.

The energy stores the body is looking to replenish is called glycogen, which is stored carbohydrates. That "flat" feeling you get about an hour after your workout? That's often from muscle glycogen depletion. Your body is programmed to address its energy needs first thing when you finish training ... That means glycogen replenishment. That's why we developed Ignition.

Ignition was designed to help support glycogen replenishment to create an optimal environment for protein utilization. It's a glycogen supplement sourced from pure dextrose monohydrate - The simplest form of carbohydrate. This carb can help deliver glucose to muscles rapidly to help support glycogen replenishment.

Ignition is also designed to act on insulin, the body's main storage hormone. With the help of insulin, muscle cells can accept and retain protein and other nutrients at a higher rate. That's another reason why Ignition was formulated with pure dextrose monohydrate, which is designed to bypass liver storage to hit your muscles immediately. This is unlike other carbohydrates like fructose or sucrose, which need to be collected in and distributed by the liver before making it to muscle tissue.

Finally, Ignition contains a profile of essential vitamins and minerals proven to be depleted during training. This can further help support recovery through hydration and encouraging proper muscle function.

Don't rely on protein alone for post-workout nutrition. Stack Ignition with a high-quality whey isolate like Phormula-1 after your training. This combination can help support both glycogen replenishment and protein utilization for optimal recovery.

By helping support faster recovery, Ignition, our glycogen supplement, can help you get back to training sooner. Support your post-workout recovery with Ignition - the glycogen supplement designed to help ignite your recovery process.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Immune Health features a handpicked, balanced complex of researched ingredients. The formula includes high-potency Vitamin C (1000mg). Vitamin C is an essential antioxidant that can help support immune cell function and protect against free radical damage.

Immune Health also contains Zinc and Copper, essential minerals that play roles in immune system function. Zinc can help support immune cell development and function. On the other hand, Copper can help maintain healthy immune responses.

Immune Health even has powerful botanical ingredients like Licorice Root and Elderberry. Licorice Root has been traditionally used to support immune function and overall wellness. Elderberry Extract provides concentrated antioxidant support and has been used for centuries to help support immune health.

The powerful formula in Immune Health also features Turkey Tail Mushroom Extract. This extract can help support immune system function naturally. The addition of Green Tea Extract provides antioxidant protection to support cellular health.

Immune Health also contains Andrographis Extract. This is an herb used to help support immune function and respiratory health.

This combination of vitamins, minerals, and botanical extracts works together to help support a healthy immune response and increase the body's natural resilience.

Take control of your immune health with Immune Health!*

Staying in peak physical condition can take a toll on your entire body, including your joints. When the body is under physical stress from intense training, it can impact joint comfort and mobility. This can lead to unwanted pain, stiffness, cracking, or even popping joints; all of which can be incredibly painful and uncomfortable, especially when you are trying to train.

Joint Mobility is formulated with powerful, researched ingredients designed to help support joint health and comfort naturally.

The formula features Cissus Quadrangularis, an herb that has been used for centuries to help support bone and joint health. Cissus can help support healthy cartilage and connective tissue, making it particularly beneficial for active individuals.

Joint Mobility also contains ParActin, a specialized extract of Andrographis paniculata. ParActin has been researched for its ability to help support joint comfort and mobility.

These two powerful ingredients work together to help support both immediate joint comfort and long-term joint health.

Joint Mobility is completely shellfish-free, making it suitable for those with shellfish sensitivities.

So, whether you're an athlete or simply someone who wants to maintain healthy joints ... Joint Mobility provides the targeted support your joints need to stay active and mobile.

Support your joint health naturally with Joint Mobility!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: L-Carnitine w/ Fucoxanthin
description_html:
L-Carnitine Supplement for Metabolic & Energy Support

L-Carnitine with Fucoxanthin is an L-Carnitine supplement designed to help support normal energy metabolism and overall metabolic health. It combines L-Carnitine with Fucoxanthin, an antioxidant found in certain green superfoods.

This L-Carnitine supplement is designed to help support:

  • Metabolic Health
  • Fatty Acid Transportation
  • Antioxidant Support
  • Overall Metabolic Wellness

L-Carnitine plays a role in helping transport fatty acids into cells, where they can be used as part of the energy-producing processes. Because of this, L-Carnitine is commonly used to support metabolism and energy.

This formula also includes Fucoxanthin, a plant-based antioxidant found in certain green superfoods. As the body produces energy, oxidative stress can occur. Antioxidants help support the body’s natural defenses against oxidative stress and overall metabolic health.

L-Carnitine with Fucoxanthin also includes Green Tea Extract, a botanical ingredient commonly used to support metabolic health.

Together, these ingredients provide an effective way to support normal metabolic function.

Support your energy and metabolic health with 1st Phorm L-Carnitine with Fucoxanthin.*

name: Legionnaire Micro Factor
description_html:
DESCRIPTION

Having A Healthy Immune System & Body Has Never Been More Important.

Micro Factor brings together 6 different products into 1 convenient packet to give your body what it needs for a strong immune system and keep it functioning at its very best.

Micro Factor goes FAR beyond what you get from a standard multivitamin.

Each serving of Micro Factor delivers:

1. Antioxidant - Directly supports the immune system. Free radicals can cause illness and damage your cells. This weakens your body and makes you much more susceptible to catching nasty bugs and viruses. Micro Factor's potent antioxidant blend works to scavenge free radicals from your body. This helps increase your immunity and support healthy aging.*

2. Multivitamin - A quality multivitamin is vital to the proper functioning of all the body's systems, including supporting healthy metabolic functions and energy production. An effective amount of each essential vitamin and mineral is included to help your body function at its peak!*

3. Probiotic - Promotes a healthy gut. These are often overlooked, but are truly important for immune function, nutrient absorption, and overall health. Each serving of Micro Factor delivers 8 billion organism count of various researched strains. This works to balance your gut bacteria. By improving your gut health, your immune system, digestion, and energy levels improve.

4. CoQ10 - A powerful antioxidant to help your body produce more cellular energy and help with healthy cardiovascular function and support overall heart health. 

5. Essential Fatty Acids (EFA) - With our diet, environment, and lifestyle today, stress is at an all-time high. This stress suppresses your immune system and makes recovery much more difficult. This essential fatty acid blend contains omega-3's. These have been shown to support joint health and help maintain a healthy brain, heart, and joint health.

6. Fruit & Veggies - This blend gives the extra edge you need by providing a diverse, superfood blend. This includes broccoli, kale, spirulina, wheat grass, grape seed extract, and so much more! The extra nutrients offer an advantage for boosting antioxidant activity, supporting cellular detoxification, and helping protect against free radicals. All of this can help lead to healthy digestive and immune function.

All of these work together to support every area of the body. If you want to feel your best & have a strong immune system all year long, try adding Micro Factor to your daily routine!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Legionnaire Monthly Access
description_html:
DESCRIPTION

In order to be a successful Legionnaire it's vital that you are using the tools and resources that are provided within the Legionnaire Program.  As an active Legionnaire you have access to online training, one-on-one training, a personal certified coach for your personal goals, early and exclusive access to gear and products, and so much more ... plus your monthly access includes a product credit each month to use towards products of your choice.  After all, it's hard to recommend products that you haven't experienced and aren't using consistently yourself.

With the Legionnaire Monthly Access product credit you have the choice of what products you'll utilize each month. We highly recommend that the Daily Stack (Micro Factor and Opti-Greens 50) be a staple in your supplementation but if you're stocked up there you can try out any of our industry leading products each month.

**NOTE: Your product credit code will be emailed to you on a monthly basis and can be used at any point within 30 days of receiving it.**

name: Legionnaire Opti-Greens 50
description_html:
DESCRIPTION

Did you know that approximately 80% of your immune system is located in your gut?

Give your body the nutrients to help build a strong immune system.* Having a strong immune system and gut is a good way to keep healthy and improve your well-being.

Opti-Greens 50 is an immune-supporting greens powder.* Every serving of Opti-Greens 50 is packed with 50 hand-chosen, gluten-free, alkalizing ingredients to help support a strong immune system.* Opti-Greens 50 has a diverse blend of fruits, veggies, and grasses to maximize the nutrients you’ll get in every scoop.

In fact, Opti-Greens 50 includes low-temperature processed, 100% organic grasses, non-GMO, non-synthetic botanical superfoods, phytonutrients, digestive enzymes, and probiotics to create the most complete greens powder on the market.

Opti-Greens 50's blend of 8 ORGANIC grasses and greens delivers the nutrients of a 2oz shot of juiced greens. This extra boost helps you feel great every day!

Along with the grasses, Opti-Greens 50 is packed with carotenoids and bioflavonoids in every scoop. These compounds help support your overall well-being.

To help you break down the food you eat, we included a digestive enzyme and probiotic blend.* Each serving provides over 1 Billion CFU’s (colony-forming units) from 10 different strains of good bacteria.

This combination supports digestion, which may help with temporary bloating.* Bloating may signal that you're not fully digesting the food you eat.*

Once you start taking Opti-Greens 50, you'll notice a decrease in occasional discomfort from bloating, so you can look and feel great!*

Having a healthy glycemic response to food is important.* Opti-Greens 50 contains a Glycemic Balance Blend to help regulate glycemic response to food.* Balancing this may help give you a smooth boost of energy, instead of the highs and lows in energy from glycemic levels that spike and crash.*

Who knew a greens powder could do so much?

It doesn't matter if you're exercising daily and working toward a fitness goal, or you're just trying to stay healthy ... Opti-Greens 50 gives you key nutrients to help you feel your best all year long!*

GLUTEN FREE

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

name: Level-1
description_html:
Level-1 is a premium whey protein powder designed to deliver a sustained release of protein to help support muscle repair and growth.

Level-1 can help support:

  • Muscle Repair & Growth
  • Muscle Recovery
  • Daily Protein Intake
  • Overall Wellness

Just try it once! That's all it takes to understand what makes Level-1 such an incredible protein. Level-1 is so delicious that you'll wonder how you ever got by using anything else.

Level-1 is crafted to deliver premium protein in a sustained-release format. The formula in Level-1 is designed to mimic the assimilation rates of whole food proteins. We use strictly low-temperature processed protein to source Level-1. This is a method to ensure the delicate protein fractions remain intact, which can help support and preserve the bioavailability and unique functional properties of the protein.

Level-1 also contains 5g of naturally occurring Branched Chain Amino Acids (BCAAs). These amino acids can help support muscle tissue repair and growth. Level-1 even has 2g of glutamine per scoop, an amino acid that makes up roughly 61% of the amino acid pool in muscle tissue.

Whether you're looking to support your training goals, daily protein intake, or overall wellness ... Level-1 can help support your lifestyle. The sustained protein delivery system was designed to help support your body's protein needs throughout the day.

  • 23-25g Protein per scoop
  • 5g Naturally occurring BCAAs
  • 2g Glutamine
  • Low-temperature processed to support the preservation of heat-sensitive protein fractions

Level-1: Just try it once, that's all it takes.*

name: Liposomal Vitamin C
description_html:
Liposomal Vitamin C: Advanced Absorption Vitamin C Support

Liposomal Vitamin C can help support:

• Immune System Function
• Antioxidant Protection
• Cardiovascular Health
• Iron Absorption
• Overall Wellness

Vitamin C is an essential water-soluble vitamin that plays a crucial role in our overall health. While many people try to get adequate Vitamin C through diet, it can be challenging to maintain optimal levels consistently.

The problem with traditional Vitamin C supplements is absorption. Standard Vitamin C can be degraded through digestion, limiting its effectiveness. That's why we developed Liposomal Vitamin C.

Liposomal technology encapsulates Vitamin C in tiny fat-based spheres called liposomes. These liposomes protect the vitamin as it travels through your digestive system and can help enhance absorption at the cellular level. This advanced delivery method can help increase nutrient uptake and bioavailability compared to standard Vitamin C supplements.

Whether you're looking to support immune function, antioxidant protection, or overall wellness ... Liposomal Vitamin C provides the advanced absorption your body needs for optimal Vitamin C support.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Liver Detox
description_html:
Liver Detox is a comprehensive liver and kidney support supplement. It's designed to help support the body's natural detoxification processes.

Liver Detox can help support:

• Natural Detoxification Processes 
• Liver Health & Function 
• Kidney Health & Function 
• Cellular Health 
• Overall Wellness

Our bodies are exposed to more environmental toxins today than ever before. These come from pollution, processed foods, alcohol, and chemicals we come in contact with every day. This is where the body's internal detox system plays an important role: the liver and kidneys.

The liver is one of your body's hardest-working organs. All blood leaving the stomach and intestines passes through the liver. This is where substances in blood are filtered and processed before circulating through the body. 

The liver performs over 300 functions, including producing cholesterol, regulating amino acids, building proteins, and storing glucose as glycogen. Your kidneys work alongside the liver as natural filters, helping to eliminate waste in the blood before it recirculates.

While it's impossible to avoid all environmental toxins ... you can help support the body's natural ability to process them. Liver Detox was formulated to help support liver and kidney function. This can be especially important when these organs are working harder due to stress, poor diet, or increased toxin exposure.

Give your hardworking detoxification system the support it deserves with Liver Detox.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

1st Phorm Magnesium can help support:

Magnesium is the fourth most abundant mineral in our bodies. The problem is, over 50% of adults are not reaching the recommended daily intake. That’s why adding a high-quality powdered magnesium supplement can be essential for filling that gap and supporting optimal health.

Magnesium is important for strong bone structure and is involved in hundreds of bodily functions. From cellular reactions to enzymatic processes, magnesium plays a role in a lot. It's an essential mineral that helps convert food to energy and assists in muscle contraction and relaxation. Magnesium also regulates neurotransmitters throughout the brain and nervous system, keeping these nerves sending and receiving messages efficiently.

1st Phorm Magnesium is a convenient, powdered magnesium formula designed for effective absorption. As a multi-source magnesium supplement, it offers several diverse forms of the essential mineral. It can help support everything from bone health to cardiovascular health, nutrient metabolism, mood, and healthy nerve and muscle contractions.

Although it can be taken any time of day, you may choose to take 1st Phorm Magnesium in the evening or at nighttime as it can help support physical and mental relaxation.

name: Micro Factor
description_html:
Micro Factor brings together 6 different products into 1 convenient daily nutrient packet. Each serving of Micro Factor provides the body with the essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients it needs to support whole-body health.

Micro Factor can help support:

• Immune Health
• Natural Energy
• Optimal Metabolism
• Gut & Digestive Health
• Nutrient Absorption
• Cardiovascular Health
• Natural Detox

Micro Factor daily vitamin packs go far beyond what you get from a standard multivitamin. Each daily nutrient packet delivers:

1. Antioxidant - Can help support the immune system by neutralizing free radicals. Free radicals are toxins absorbed in our day-to-day lives that can cause illness and damage cells. This can weaken the body and make it more susceptible to nasty bugs and viruses. Micro Factor's potent antioxidant blend is designed to scavenge free radicals from the body. This can help support immunity and healthy aging.

2. Multivitamin - The multivitamin in Micro Factor contains essential vitamins and minerals. These essential vitamins and minerals are responsible for thousands of metabolic processes, functions, and even energy production. In Micro Factor, each essential vitamin and mineral is included to support the body at the cellular level.

3. Probiotic - Probiotics are healthy bacteria that can support a healthy gut. They're often overlooked, but they play a role in the immune system, nutrient absorption, and overall health. Each serving of Micro Factor delivers an 8 billion organism count of beneficial strains. This can support a balanced culture of bacteria in the gut. By improving gut health, the immune system, digestion, and energy levels can be improved.

4. CoQ10 - A powerful antioxidant to help the body produce more cellular energy. CoQ10 is also known for its ability to help support cardiovascular health, specifically heart health.

5. Essential Fatty Acids (EFAs) - Between our diets, environment, and lifestyles ... stress is at an all-time high. This stress can suppress the immune system and make recovery much more difficult. This essential fatty acid blend contains omega-3s. These have been shown to support joint health, healthy levels of inflammation, and help maintain brain, heart, and joint health.

6. Fruit & Veggies - The fruit and veggie capsules in Micro Factor provide a diverse blend of superfoods. This includes broccoli, kale, spirulina, wheat grass, grape seed extract, and so much more! These extra nutrients can help support increased antioxidant activity, cellular detox, digestive health, and immune function.

All 6 supplements in Micro Factor vitamin packets are designed to work together. If you want to look and feel great, Micro Factor daily nutrient packets provide the nutrients that can help support whole-body health!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Micronized Creatine Monohydrate
description_html:
Micronized Creatine Monohydrate is now available in both 50 and 100 servings!

  • Explosive Power & Strength
  • Support ATP Regeneration
  • Increase Muscle Cell Volume

Research shows that pure creatine can enhance athletic performance for women and men, and has helped countless athletes train harder, work out longer, and, bottom line ... produce better health and fitness results.

Creatine is a naturally occurring energy source. Your body uses it to fight off muscle fatigue and increase endurance. Pure micronized creatine monohydrate acts as a cell volumizer. This leads to increased anabolism and muscle protein synthesis. Increasing creatine levels in the body allows for improved ATP regeneration. This acts as a supply of power that your muscles can use during intense exercise. 

With creatine monohydrate as a source of fast energy ... glycolysis (the metabolic breakdown of glucose into energy) decreases. In turn, muscle acidosis takes longer, increasing endurance and strength.

Gone are the days of creatine bloat and discomfort. This isn't any regular creatine monohydrate. At 1st Phorm, we chose to micronize our creatine monohydrate for enhanced solubility and bioavailability. Micronized Creatine Monohydrate is a powder that mixes easily, is absorbed quickly, and offers no digestive stress. As with all 1st Phorm products, you're getting the highest quality possible. Micronized Creatine Monohydrate is designed and manufactured to be the purest micronized creatine.

If you are looking for a product to increase strength, power, endurance, and performance ... 1st Phorm's Micronized Creatine Monohydrate is exactly what you're looking for! Your body will love it.

Experience the difference with 1st Phorm Micronized Creatine Monohydrate now!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Multi-Fiber
description_html:
Fiber Supplement Powder for Daily Digestive Support

Multi-Fiber is a fiber supplement powder designed to help support daily fiber intake. It includes a balanced blend of soluble and insoluble fibers. Unlike single-source fiber powders, Multi-Fiber combines multiple fiber types into one easy-to-mix drink.

Multi-Fiber is designed to help support:

  • Digestive Health
  • Gut Bacterial Balance
  • Regularity
  • Satiety Support
  • Overall Wellness

Many people do not get enough fiber from fruits, vegetables, and whole grains alone. Fiber plays an important role in digestive health and regularity, which is why consistent intake is important.

Multi-Fiber provides fiber from three complementary sources, delivering both soluble and insoluble fibers to help support digestive function.

Soluble and insoluble fibers serve different roles in the digestive system. Together, they help support digestion, regularity, and overall gut health when consumed consistently.

Multi-Fiber is designed to mix smoothly without a gritty texture. It can be added to water or mixed into other drinks as part of your daily routine. 

Support your daily fiber intake and overall digestive health with Multi-Fiber.*

name: NASM Certification
description_html:
We've partnered with NASM as an approved provider to bring you their most popular certifications at a deeply discounted rate ... another great benefit of being a 1st Phorm Legionnaire.

After you complete your purchase, please allow 1-2 business days for your access key to the certification program you purchased to arrive. We will send it in a separate email at that time.

NASM Certified Personal Trainer (CPT)

The NASM Certified Personal Trainer (CPT) program is designed to equip you with cutting-edge techniques and practical knowledge to guide clients toward achieving their fitness and health goals. This course offers a deep dive into exercise science, kinesiology, and performance enhancement, all underpinned by evidence-based practices that have been rigorously peer-reviewed by leading industry professionals.

Upon completion of this course, you will be able to:

Design Personalized Fitness Programs: Craft tailored workout routines based on an individual's specific health and fitness objectives, ensuring optimal results and client safety.

Apply Evidence-Backed Techniques: Utilize the most recent, peer-reviewed exercise science to enhance client performance, reduce injury risk, and ensure their long-term success in health and fitness endeavors.

Engage in Effective Client Communication: Harness powerful communication and motivational strategies to inspire and guide clients on their fitness journey, catering to their unique needs, capabilities, and aspirations.

Achieving the NASM CPT credential empowers you to stand out in the fitness industry, championing both the physical and mental facets of personal training to create holistic, transformative experiences for your clients.

NASM Certified Nutrition Coach (CNC)

The NASM Certified Nutrition Coach (CNC) is your education solution for guiding clients toward optimal nutrition choices for health- and wellness-related outcomes. The course arms you with evidence-backed nutrition science that has been peer-reviewed by multiple experts in the industry. It also teaches you how to use behavior change and coaching strategies with your clients to develop long-lasting weight loss and healthful nutrition habits.

Upon completion of this course, you will be able to:

Evaluate client nutrition needs based on evidence-backed and peer-reviewed nutritional science.

Employ behavior change strategies during client conversations about health, fitness, and wellness.

Coach clients on navigating various nutrition choices based on their needs, goals, lifestyle, and food preferences.

NASM Physique and Bodybuilding Coach (PBC)

The all-new NASM Physique and Bodybuilding Coach specialization (NASM-PBC) will deliver your next step in fitness programming knowledge to meet the needs of bodybuilding and physique clients. The curriculum takes a comprehensive approach to physique programming, covering everything from weight training to nutrition and supplementation techniques for physique athletes and fitness enthusiasts of all levels and experiences.

The NASM-PBC takes the guesswork out of training for physique goals. Through expert insight and detailed resources, you can help clients break through all the misinformation and noise of physique training seen on social media and the internet. You’ll tap into well-rounded programming that gives you the inspiration, insight, and methods to successfully reach your goals or coach clients toward their aesthetic aspirations.

Master the art and science of coaching physique and bodybuilding athletes. Become the expert your clients turn to for all their body transformation needs.

NASM Certified Sports Nutrition Coach (CSNC)

With our Certified Sports Nutrition Coach (NASM-CSNC) course, you’ll learn how to develop personalized nutritional recommendations to optimize performance and recovery for fitness clients and athletes.

Gain an edge on your competition by learning the latest sports nutrition principles to support healthy performance. You'll help your clients improve their results and transform their training through nutrition.

name: NCI Level 1 Applied Nutrition Coach Certification
description_html:
DESCRIPTION:

We've partnered with NCI as an approved provider to bring you this certification at a deeply discounted rate ... another great benefit of being a 1st Phorm Legionnaire.

After you complete your purchase, please allow 1-2 business days for your access key to the certification program you purchased to arrive. We will send it in a separate email at that time.

Become a Certified Nutrition Coach with a Difference
Embark on a Journey to Master Practical Nutritional Coaching

The Nutritional Coaching Institute (NCI) presents a unique opportunity for aspiring nutrition coaches through its Level 1 Applied Nutrition Coach online course. This self-paced, immersive program is designed to empower you with the knowledge and tools necessary for delivering exceptional, personalized nutrition coaching.

Evidence-Based Curriculum with a Practical Focus

NCI's curriculum is deeply rooted in evidence-based practices, blending scientific knowledge with practical application. The course emphasizes a comprehensive understanding of nutritional principles and their real-life implementation. This approach ensures that you're not just learning theories but are also equipped to apply them effectively in diverse scenarios.

Holistic Approach to Nutrition and Well-being

Understanding that nutrition coaching is more than just dietary advice, NCI adopts a holistic approach. The course covers a broad spectrum, including food choices, mindset, behavior change, and overall well-being. This well-rounded education prepares you to address the myriad aspects of your clients' nutritional journeys.

Recognized by Leading Fitness Organizations

As an approved provider by the National Academy of Sports Medicine (NASM) and the Athletics and Fitness Association of America (AFAA), NCI’s program stands out for its quality and relevance. While not an accredited coaching program, the course is recognized for its excellence in the field.

Interactive Learning and Community Engagement

NCI’s course structure supports a self-directed learning approach, supplemented by consistent support and community interaction. You'll gain access to a private Facebook group for networking with fellow coaches and receive dedicated guidance from course instructors. The program also features live calls, offering a platform to discuss, clarify, and deepen your understanding.

From Knowledge to Application: The Essence of a Nutrition Coach

NCI believes in the power of application. While a nutritionist may be a master of knowledge, a nutrition coach is a master of practical application. This course is designed to transform you into an expert who can identify specific nutritional needs and provide actionable, tailored advice that clients are more likely to follow.

Comprehensive Skill Development for Real-world Challenges

Upon completing the course, you'll be adept at addressing various challenges, from low compliance and stalled results to navigating fad diets, eating disorders, and harmful nutritional habits. This skill set is invaluable in correcting clients’ diets and steering them towards healthier, more sustainable choices.

Your Path to Transforming Lives

The Applied Nutritional Coach Level 1 certification simplifies complex scientific concepts and focuses on their practical application. This course isn't just an educational journey; it's a pathway to real-world success for both you and your clients.

Enroll Today: Start Making a Difference

Get the Level 1 Nutrition Certification Course now and begin your journey to becoming a transformational force in the lives of others – and in your own career as a nutrition coach.

name: Opti-Greens 50
description_html:
Support a Strong & Healthy Immune System with Opti-Greens 50: The Ultimate Superfood Greens Powder

Opti-Greens 50 can help support:

• Immune Health
• Gut Health
• Digestion
• Natural Energy
• pH Balance

It doesn't matter whether it's January or June, staying healthy is important all year long. As soon as someone starts coughing around us, we're quick to disinfect every surface and break out the hand sanitizer ... but there's A LOT more you can do to protect yourself and your health.

Did you know that approximately 80% of your immune system is located in your gut? Giving your body the right nutrients can help build a strong immune system. Plus, a strong immune system and gut can help improve many aspects of your overall health.

Opti-Greens 50 is an immune-supporting superfood greens powder. Every serving of Opti-Greens 50 is packed with 50 hand-chosen, gluten-free, alkalizing ingredients. It also contains a diverse blend of natural fruits, veggies, and grasses to maximize the nutrients you can get in every scoop of this green superfood powder.

Opti-Greens 50 can be a quick and convenient way to get your daily dose of nutrient-rich greens without the sourcing, preparing, cooking, and cleaning ... the perfect solution for busy lifestyles.

At 1st Phorm, we make quality and bioavailability a priority. If your body can't absorb it, it won't be of much help ... and that goes for anything, including a greens superfood powder. The Phytonutrient Complex in Opti-Greens 50 contains carotenoids and bioflavonoids. These two antioxidants are essential for the removal of tissue damaging free radicals from your body. Opti-Kids: Complete Children's Superfood Powder

Opti-Kids can help support:

• Daily Fruit & Vegetable Nutrition 
• Healthy Growth & Development 
• Digestive Health 
• Immune System Function 
• Overall Wellness

We want our kids to be healthy, but let's be real, the daily debate with them to eat their fruits and vegetables gets old. Maybe you are one of the few lucky parents who don't have a picky eater who would rather sit at the dinner table in a standoff with you for hours than eat their disgusting vegetables ... or who won't eat any kind of fruit besides a packet of fruit snacks.

For the rest of us, it can be a real struggle to get our kids to consume the 3-4 servings of vegetables or the 2-3 servings of fruits a day that the USDA recommends. That's why we developed Opti-Kids!

The comprehensive blend of non-GMO fruits, vegetables, digestive enzymes, probiotics, and all-organic grasses in Opti-Kids will give you peace of mind that your kids are getting what they need and deserve. Plus, the amazing chocolate milkshake flavor of Opti-Kids will have them begging for more!

Opti-Kids provides high-potency vitamins including Vitamin A, Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Vitamin K. The formula also includes essential B vitamins like Thiamin, Riboflavin, Niacin, Vitamin B6, Folate, Biotin, and Pantothenic Acid to help support healthy growth and development.

We also included 6g of low-temperature processed whey protein isolate. This can help provide the necessary building blocks (amino acids) for their growing bodies. Plus, Opti-Kids contains a kid-friendly boost of essential probiotic nutrients to help support your little one's digestive system!

Providing your kids with the nutrients their growing bodies need has never been easier ... or yummier!*

name: Opti-Reds 50
description_html:
Superfood Reds Powder for Daily Wellness Support

Opti-Reds 50 is a premium superfood reds powder made with 50 carefully selected fruits, vegetables, and herbs designed to help support:

  • Cellular Health
  • Metabolic Function
  • Natural Energy Levels
  • Nitric Oxide Production
  • Circulation & Blood Flow
  • Overall Wellness

Every day, the body is exposed to environmental stressors from air, food, water, and daily activity. These stressors can contribute to oxidative stress in the body. Antioxidants from fruits and vegetables help support the body’s natural defense systems.

Colorful plant foods provide naturally occurring compounds such as polyphenols, carotenoids, and anthocyanins. These compounds are commonly studied for their role in supporting cellular health and overall wellness.

The challenge is consistently consuming a wide variety of fruits and vegetables every day. That’s where Opti-Reds 50 comes in.

Opti-Reds 50 combines 50 antioxidant-rich superfoods into one convenient daily reds drink. The ingredients are selected to help support nitric oxide production, circulation, and cellular activity. Supporting healthy cellular function can also contribute to metabolism and natural energy levels.

This superfood reds powder makes it easy to increase your intake of plant-based nutrients without needing to source dozens of individual fruits and vegetables.

Simply mix Opti-Reds 50 with water and enjoy it daily as part of your wellness routine.

  • Gluten-Free
  • Non-GMO
  • No Artificial Flavors, Colors, or Sweeteners
  • Refreshing Berry Flavor

For more comprehensive daily nutrition support, Opti-Reds 50 pairs well with our superfood greens powder, Opti-Greens 50.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Opti-Reds 50 Stick Packs
description_html:
Opti-Reds 50 is a premium superfood reds powder packed with 50 hand-selected colorful fruits, vegetables, and herbs.

Opti-Reds 50 can help support:

• Cellular Health & Metabolism
• Natural Energy Levels
• Nitric Oxide Production
• Blood Flow
• Natural Detox
• Overall Wellness

On a daily basis, your body has to defend itself from environmental contaminants and pollutants. These toxins are present in everything from the air we breathe to the foods and water we drink. When the body has an overabundance of these toxins, known as free radicals, it can wreak havoc on healthy tissue.

So, how do we fight these toxins? One way is by consuming a wide variety of colorful fruits and vegetables. These foods contain the nutrients and compounds that can help support natural detox and overall health. Anthocyanins in red, purple, and blue fruits ... name: Phormula-1
description_html:
Phormula-1 is a premium-sourced whey protein isolate. Not only can you taste the difference, but you can actually feel the difference when you use Phormula-1!

Phormula-1 can help support:

  • Muscle Repair & Growth
  • Muscle Recovery
  • Muscular Endurance & Strength
  • Healthy Body Composition

The key to Phormula-1 is its purity. To source Phormula-1, we use strictly low-temperature processed, cross-flow micro-filtrated whey protein isolate. This provides whey protein isolate that is virtually void of lactose and fats, while also being highly bioavailable.

By removing excess fat and lactose, Phormula-1 was designed to digest and assimilate rapidly. Because of this, Phormula-1 can be a great option for pre- and post-workout supplementation. In fact, Phormula-1 was designed to support recovery from training.

With its rapid-digesting properties, Phormula-1 can also be a great option to use first thing in the morning. This can help the body jump out of a natural state of breakdown from fasting overnight. The protein in Phormula-1 can offer a quick hit of essential amino acids to help support the process of repairing and building lean muscle.

  • Low-temperature processed to support the preservation of heat-sensitive protein fractions
  • Cross-flow micro-filtrated (natural ceramic filtration) to remove excess fats and lactose without the use of chemicals or plastic

Make the switch and feel the difference with Phormula-1 whey protein isolate!*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
