name: Prenatal Plus
description_html:
Prenatal Plus: Complete Prenatal Multivitamin for Pregnancy & Nursing

Prenatal Plus is a comprehensive prenatal multivitamin designed to help support women before conception, throughout pregnancy, and during nursing. It provides essential vitamins and minerals in targeted amounts to support maternal nutrition and fetal development.

This prenatal multivitamin is designed to help support:

  • Healthy Fetal Development
  • Maternal Nutritional Needs
  • Energy & Vitality During Pregnancy
  • Immune System Function
  • Bone & Teeth Development

Providing your body with proper nutrition is always important, but it becomes even more critical before, during, and after pregnancy. Nutrient needs increase significantly during this time. Plus, meeting those demands can help support both maternal wellness and healthy development.

Prenatal Plus is formulated to help support the unique nutritional needs of women during pre-conception, pregnancy, and nursing. This prenatal multivitamin is designed to help fill common nutritional gaps while supporting both maternal health and healthy fetal development.

Key Nutrients in Prenatal Plus

Folate - Provides 800 mcg of this essential nutrient to help support proper neural tube development during early pregnancy.

Iron - Helps support healthy red blood cell formation and oxygen transport. Iron needs increase during pregnancy to support both mother and baby.

Calcium & Vitamin D3 - Work together to help support strong bone and teeth development.

B Vitamins - Including Thiamin, Riboflavin, Niacin, Vitamin B6, and Vitamin B12 to help support cellular energy production and overall vitality.

Immune Support Nutrients - Vitamins A, C, D, and Zinc help support normal immune function during pregnancy and nursing.

Antioxidant Support - Vitamins C and E help support the body’s natural defenses against oxidative stress.

Many healthcare professionals recommend using a high-quality prenatal multivitamin to help support healthy pregnancy outcomes. Prenatal Plus provides peace of mind by delivering essential nutrients in appropriate amounts during every stage of pregnancy and nursing.

Whether you’re planning to conceive, currently pregnant, or nursing, Prenatal Plus offers comprehensive prenatal nutrition support for this important stage of life.

For additional maternal wellness support, consider pairing Prenatal Plus with Full-Mega in the Joy Bundle.*

name: Probiotic
description_html:
Probiotic Supplement for Digestive & Gut Health Support

1st Phorm Probiotic is a probiotic supplement formulated to help support digestive health. It delivers beneficial bacteria that play an important role in gut balance and overall wellness.

Our probiotic supplement is designed to help support:

  • Gut Balance & Digestive Health
  • Digestion & Nutrient Absorption
  • Immune & Metabolic Function
  • Overall Wellness

From birth, beneficial bacteria begin to populate the digestive tract. These microorganisms are a natural part of the gut microbiome. They're also involved in digestion, nutrient utilization, and supporting normal immune function.

Over time, many factors can influence the balance of bacteria in the gut. This includes diet, stress, lifestyle habits, medications, aging, and environmental exposure. When this balance is disrupted, digestive comfort and regularity may be affected.

That’s why proper nutrition and lifestyle habits are important for maintaining gut health. In addition to these habits, a high-quality probiotic supplement can help support a balanced gut environment.

1st Phorm Probiotic provides 8 billion shelf-stable CFUs of live, beneficial bacteria per serving. It features Lactobacillus acidophilus, one of the most well-researched probiotic strains. It's also the most common strain found in the human digestive tract.

Our probiotic supplement is designed to help support a healthy digestive environment when used consistently and as a part of a balanced diet and lifestyle.

Try 1st Phorm Probiotic to help support gut health, digestion, and overall wellness.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Project-1 Pro is a full-dose, high-stim pre-workout you can use for any athletic activity you choose. This means that every ingredient in Project-1 Pro is present in a fully effective amount. Project-1 Pro can help take your energy, focus, strength, and workout performance to an all-new level.

The balanced, smooth, and focused energy you can get from Project-1 Pro is something many rave about! We carefully selected only premium ingredients to accomplish this. For one, Project-1 Pro has 350mg of pure Caffeine Anhydrous, making it a great high-stim pre-workout option. It also contains 300mg of Alpha GPC and 2.5mg of Yohimbine HCI, which can help support long-lasting energy and focus to power through your workout.

You'll also get a full 6g of Citrulline, VasoDrive-AP®, and 190mg of Phyt02™. This combination can help support strength, pump, and overall performance. It can feel like your muscles are getting all the blood and nutrients they need to perform their best.

To push the threshold of strength and endurance, we included 5g of Creatine Monohydrate and 3.2g of Beta-Alanine. Beta-Alanine is an ingredient widely used to help buffer acid in the muscles to support decreased muscle fatigue. This can help with pushing muscles past their limits.

Experience incredible workouts and push your body to a whole new level with Project-1 Pro!*

Project-1 Pro is also available in a lower-stimulant version, Project-1.

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

description_html:
Radiant: Advanced Skin Health & Beauty Support

Radiant can help support:

• Healthy, Clear Skin
• Natural Radiance & Glow
• Skin's Response to Environmental Stress
• Toxin Protection

Even as mature adults, some of us still struggle with maintaining healthy, clear skin. The good news is that there are certain ways to help support your skin's natural beauty and radiance from the inside out!

We developed Radiant to help support your skin's natural response to daily stressors like poor diet, environmental toxins, and everyday life challenges. Your skin is your largest protective barrier and works tirelessly to protect you every single day ... and all of this can take a toll on your skin's appearance and health.

Radiant features a carefully selected blend of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that can help support your skin's natural defense systems. This specialized formula works from within to help support skin health and promote a clean, smooth, and radiant complexion.

As your largest organ, your skin is responsible for filtering many contaminants as they're eliminated from your body. With the proper intake of specific nutrients, you can help support your body's natural filtration processes and maintain healthy, glowing skin.

The synergistic blend of ingredients in Radiant is designed to help support your skin's natural beauty and radiance. By providing your skin with the nutritional support it needs, you can help maintain that healthy glow you've always wanted.

Whether you're dealing with occasional skin concerns or simply want to maintain your natural radiance ... Radiant provides the comprehensive skin support you need to look and feel your absolute best!*

• Natural Water Balance

Symmetry is a natural, extra-strength diuretic designed to support decreased water retention.

The carefully selected botanical ingredients in Symmetry work synergistically to help support your body's natural water balance. This targeted approach can help reduce the appearance of bloating and water retention.

Symmetry also contains two key minerals, potassium and magnesium. These minerals can help maintain electrolyte balance as your body processes fluids. They can also help support proper muscle function and important metabolic processes.

Whether you're dealing with travel-related water retention, preparing for a photo shoot, getting ready for a special event, or stepping on stage for a competition ... Symmetry can help support the lean, defined look you're working toward.*

name: Thyro-Drive
description_html:
Thyro-Drive is an advanced formula designed to support optimal thyroid function for healthy metabolism.

Thyro-Drive can help support:

• Healthy Thyroid Function
• Optimal Metabolism
• Natural Energy Levels

The thyroid gland plays a crucial role in the body. When thyroid function is optimized, it can promote healthy metabolism and energy levels. The problem is, many factors can impact thyroid function. This includes stress, diet, and lifestyle. When the thyroid isn't functioning optimally, it can affect the body's ability to maintain a healthy metabolism.

Thyro-Drive was formulated to help support thyroid function by providing the raw materials for optimal hormone production. The ingredients in Thyro-Drive can help support the production of T3 and T4 thyroid hormones, which play important roles in metabolism and energy regulation.

Thyro-Drive is also equipped with ingredients to help support basal metabolic rate and elevate core body temperature. This can help with extra calorie burning, which is an important aspect of weight loss.

Unlike other fat-burning products, Thyro-Drive is free of stimulants. It can be taken day or night without concern of jitters or restless sleep.

For comprehensive metabolism support, Thyro-Drive can be stacked with other products like 1-Db Overdrive or 1-Db Goddess. This combination allows you to address metabolism support through multiple pathways. 

Support healthy metabolism and thyroid function with Thyro-Drive.*

*These statements have not been evaluated by The Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Ultra-Formance
description_html:
Ultra-Formance: Advanced Pre- and Intra-Workout Carbohydrate Formula

Ultra-Formance can help support:

  • Sustained Energy & Endurance
  • Electrolyte Balance & Hydration
  • Performance During Long Workouts
  • Multi-Phase Fuel Delivery

We designed Ultra-Formance as an advanced pre- and intra-workout carbohydrate formula to help fuel you through those extremely long and grueling workouts ... whether it's in the gym, step by step on the pavement, putting in mile after mile on the bike, or long-distance swimming.

Ultra-Formance features three strategic carbohydrate sources: Cluster Dextrin, Fructose, and Dextrose. Between the three, you'll get 24g of carbohydrates per serving. This multi-carb approach can help fuel all segments of your workout: before, during, and after. Each carb source has different absorption rates, creating sustained energy delivery when you need it most.

Our unique Hydration Complex provides 2,375mg per serving of essential electrolytes, including Calcium, Potassium, Sodium, and Magnesium. This comprehensive blend can help support electrolyte balance and replace what you lose through sweat.

Ultra-Formance is also formulated to be easily digestible. That way, you won't feel weighed down during intense training.

Whether you're training for endurance events, pushing through high-volume sessions, or need sustained energy for long workouts ... Ultra-Formance provides the comprehensive fuel and hydration support your body needs to perform.*

description_html:
Vegan Power Pro is a high-quality, delicious, and non-dairy vegan protein powder.   • No Artificial Flavors or Sweeteners

  • No Artificial Colors or Dyes

Vegan Power Pro tastes exceptional and mixes like a breeze, placing it amongst the best vegan protein powders on the market. Not only can you taste the difference, but you can also feel the difference!

The vegan protein sources used in Vegan Power Pro make it an ideal choice for anyone on a plant-based diet. But even those who aren't can benefit from Vegan Power Pro. If you have a lactose intolerance or difficulty digesting animal protein sources ... Vegan Power Pro can also be a great option. Consider it a quality, non-dairy protein powder option!

Vegan Power Pro is also very low in carbohydrates and fats, making it a great choice for those on a low-carb diet. It can be particularly useful for anyone looking to get more protein without these additional nutrients.

Vegan Power Pro is easy to mix with water or add to a smoothie. You can take Vegan Power Pro any time throughout the day or even before bed to help support lean muscle repair and growth. Pair Vegan Power Pro can also be paired with Ignition post-workout to support muscle recovery.
